fielding_windows.fielding_date_source: Planned fielding dates are locked from the Wave 8 preregistration and must be replaced by restricted fielding disposition timestamps before citation.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted raw respondent by item matrix used to compute started, eligible, excluded, and final analytic sample counts.
Restricted consent, eligibility, completion, quality-flag, exclusion, and vendor-disposition file for respondent-flow reconstruction.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered respondent-flow notebook that applies Wave 8 exclusion rules before any psychometric outcome inspection.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. Replace null hashes and unsigned fields with observed restricted-data, script, output, analyst, and reviewer evidence before this gate can be cited.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted eligible respondent frame used as the sole input to preregistered EFA and CFA split assignment.
Restricted split-assignment file recording EFA and CFA allocation, stratification variables, seed, and creation timestamp.

analysis_scripts.description: Split-assignment script that must run before outcome inspection using sample source, device category, and domain-block order strata.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. Split validity is not observed until the restricted split file hash, script hash, seed, and pre-inspection timestamp are recorded.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted item-response matrix joined to the locked EFA split indicator for ordinal exploratory factor analysis.
Restricted EFA and CFA split assignment required to prove the EFA model was not estimated on the confirmatory split.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered ordinal EFA notebook producing factor-count, loading, cross-loading, threshold, and residual local-dependence outputs.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. EFA statistics are planned placeholders until restricted input hashes, notebook hash, software lock, and output hash are complete.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted item-response matrix joined to the locked CFA split indicator for seven-factor confirmatory model estimation.
Restricted split-assignment file proving CFA was estimated on the independent confirmatory split.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered CFA notebook producing CFI, TLI, RMSEA, SRMR, standardized loading, residual correlation, and comparator-model outputs.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. CFA fit cannot be cited until the independent split, model output, software session, analyst, and reviewer records are checksum-bound.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted item-response matrix used to estimate ordinal omega for each retained Wave 8 domain.
Restricted split-assignment file used to report whether omega estimates were computed on splits or descriptively on the full analytic sample.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered reliability notebook producing domain omega estimates, confidence intervals, and threshold decisions.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. Omega evidence remains planned until retained-item inputs, reliability outputs, software lock, and reviewer signoff are present.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted retained-item response matrix used for graded-response IRT calibration and information diagnostics.
Restricted split-assignment file used to document model-development and confirmatory calibration boundaries for IRT diagnostics.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered IRT notebook producing convergence, discrimination, threshold-ordering, local-dependence, information, and linking-SE outputs.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. IRT diagnostics are not observed evidence until calibration output and the exact runtime session are checksum-bound.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted retained-item response matrix for ordinal DIF screening across preregistered subgroups.
Restricted subgroup, exposure, device, and weighting covariates required for DIF models and sensitivity checks.
Restricted split-assignment file used to document whether DIF screening is confirmatory or descriptive for each analysis.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered DIF notebook producing FDR-adjusted flags, pseudo-R2 deltas, expected-score differences, and interpretation blocks.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. DIF evidence is not citable until subgroup covariates, model outputs, multiplicity decisions, and reviewer adjudication are recorded.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted retained-item response matrix used in multigroup configural, metric, and threshold invariance checks.
Restricted subgroup and weighting covariates defining the preregistered invariance comparisons.
Restricted split-assignment file used to document development and confirmatory boundaries for invariance diagnostics.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered invariance notebook producing convergence, delta-CFI, delta-RMSEA, partial-invariance, and domain-ordering outputs.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. Invariance evidence must remain uncited until all comparison definitions, outputs, and reviewer decisions are checksum-bound.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted item-response matrix used to estimate seven-domain latent correlations and aggregate-readiness diagnostics.
Restricted split-assignment file used to separate confirmatory latent-correlation evidence from full-sample descriptive sensitivity checks.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered latent-correlation notebook producing pairwise correlations, confidence intervals, sensitivity checks, and aggregate-readiness summaries.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. Latent-correlation evidence cannot support aggregate claims until output hashes and claim-boundary review are complete.

data_artifacts.description: Restricted Wave 8 item-response matrix containing the repeated somatic-anchor indicators.
Restricted linkage and anchor metadata file required to compare Wave 8 somatic anchors with prior-source calibration anchors.
Restricted split-assignment file used to document whether drift estimates are confirmatory or descriptive.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered anchor-drift notebook producing mean absolute drift, maximum single-item drift, and source-anchor-use decisions.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. Somatic-anchor drift evidence is uncitable until source-anchor linkage, drift outputs, and reviewer decision are complete.

data_artifacts.description: Observed-results ledger that must pass validation before the bridge decision can be reviewed or cited.
Completed content-validity dossier required before psychometric bridge evidence can support promotion language.
Restricted complete output archive for all Wave 8 bridge gates, including model logs and sensitivity outputs.

analysis_scripts.description: Preregistered decision-build notebook that maps all observed gates to the final bridge decision while leaving scoring unauthorized.

validation_statistics.provenance_note: Template record only. The final bridge decision is not observed or citable until all gate outputs, content-validity evidence, analyst signoff, reviewer signoff, and release checksums are complete.

provenance_assertion: This Wave 8 provenance file is a planned_or_placeholder template only. It records the required restricted inputs, split file, analysis scripts, software/session evidence, outputs, analyst roles, and reviewer roles, but it contains no observed citable evidence and cannot support bridge-readiness or scoring claims.
